zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas ap Jevan於大約1495年出生在英國威爾斯格拉莫爾根時，他的父親Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel35歲，母親Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn34歲。他和Ann ap Lewis至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。

zh-hans.Blaen-Bradach, Glamorgan, Wales: 英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas ap Jevan于大约1495年出生在英国威尔斯格拉莫爾根时，他的父亲Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel35岁，母亲Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn34岁。他和Ann ap Lewis至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Jevan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Iefan ‘son of Evan’, with fused patronymic marker (a)p. Compare Evan and Evans .

variants.name: Bevans
meanings: Welsh (Pembrokeshire): variant of Bevan , with the addition of the regular English patronymic suffix -s.

variants.name: Bevin
meanings: English (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French bei vin, boi vin ‘drink wine’.
Welsh and English: variant of   Bevan  .

variants.name: Biven
meanings: Welsh: variant of   Bevan  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Beaven
meanings: Possibly also English: variant of   Beavin  .

variants.name: Evan
meanings: Welsh (southern): from the personal name Evan, itself from Ieuan, a Welsh derivative of Latin Johannes (English John). See Evans .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas ap Jevan was born about 1495, in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel, was 35 and his mother, Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, was 34. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Ann ap Lewis.

fr.of Llanbradach, Glmrgn, Wls: Llanbradach, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas ap Jevan est né environ 1495, à Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Ann ap Lewis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas ap Jevan um 1495 in Glamorgan, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel 35 und seine Mutter Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn 34. Er hatte mit Ann ap Lewis mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Jevan è nato il circa 1495 nel Glamorgan, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Ann ap Lewis.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Jevanが約1495年にイギリスウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Jevan "Vachan" ap Howelは35歳，母Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelynは34歳であった。彼はAnn ap Lewisとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas ap Jevan(이)가 대략 1495년 영국 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Ann ap Lewis(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas ap Jevan nasceu aproximadamente 1495, em Glamorgan, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Ann ap Lewis.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas ap Jevan родился около 1495 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, 34. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Ann ap Lewis.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas ap Jevan nació aproximadamente 1495, en Glamorgan, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Jevan "Vachan" ap Howel, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs. Jevan ap Llewelyn, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Ann ap Lewis.
